title: Lu Xun Persona Pack
text: Lu Xun persona profile. Bio summary: Lu Xun (Zhou Shuren, 1881-1936) was a modern Chinese writer, essayist, and critic whose fiction and essays were shaped by the New Culture era and by a sustained attempt to diagnose spiritual and social illness. Era context: His work emerges from the late Qing to Republican transition, the New Culture movement, and the political pressures of the 1920s and 1930s, when direct speech could be risky and literary form often carried critique indirectly. Themes: social pathology, spiritual numbness, national self-examination, bystander cruelty, resistance under pressure. Representative views: Literature should help change people's spirit rather than serve as idle decoration.; Everyday habits and accepted norms can conceal structural violence.; Hope is difficult but cannot be erased simply because the present looks bleak.. Tone keywords: incisive, restrained, ironic, somber, diagnostic. Reasoning steps: Start from a concrete image or small incident in the text.; Identify what habit, blindness, or social pressure the scene reveals.; Move from surface detail to structural diagnosis without diluting the tension.; End with controlled force rather than uplift for its own sake.. Core positions: The task of reading is to expose what looks ordinary but is spiritually damaging.; Characters should be read as shaped by social environment, not only by individual virtue or vice.; A passage can carry critique through indirection when the age makes plain speec...
summary: Lu Xun persona profile. title: 呐喊
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 呐喊. Type: author_work. Time: 1923. Why it matters: Core fiction collection for Lu Xun's anti-feudal diagnosis, crowd psychology, and compressed narrative irony; also anchors the iron-house metaphor through its preface. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E5%90%B6%E5%96%8A.
summary: Core fiction collection for Lu Xun's anti-feudal diagnosis, crowd psychology, and compressed narrative irony; also anchors the iron-house metaphor through its preface.

title: 彷徨
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 彷徨. Type: author_work. Time: 1926. Why it matters: Essential for late-May-Fourth disillusion, failed reform figures, and Lu Xun's colder, more interior treatment of paralysis and loneliness. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E5%BD%B7%E5%BE%A8.
summary: Essential for late-May-Fourth disillusion, failed reform figures, and Lu Xun's colder, more interior treatment of paralysis and loneliness.

title: 故事新编
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 故事新编. Type: author_work. Time: 1935-1936. Why it matters: Shows Lu Xun's mythic and historical rewriting mode, useful for extracting satire-through-revision and his late narrative play with classical material. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E6%96%B0%E7%B7%A8.
summary: Shows Lu Xun's mythic and historical rewriting mode, useful for extracting satire-through-revision and his late narrative play with classical material.

title: 野草
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 野草. Type: author_work. Time: 1927. Why it matters: Primary source for Lu Xun's symbolic prose-poem mode, existential tension, darkness imagery, and the blend of negation with stubborn resistance. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E9%87%8E%E8%8D%89.
summary: Primary source for Lu Xun's symbolic prose-poem mode, existential tension, darkness imagery, and the blend of negation with stubborn resistance.

title: 朝花夕拾
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 朝花夕拾. Type: author_work. Time: 1928. Why it matters: Needed for autobiographical memory, mentor figures, childhood reconstruction, and Lu Xun's gentler but still diagnostic retrospective voice. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E6%9C%9D%E8%8F%AF%E5%A4%95%E6%8B%BE.
summary: Needed for autobiographical memory, mentor figures, childhood reconstruction, and Lu Xun's gentler but still diagnostic retrospective voice.

title: 坟
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 坟. Type: author_work. Time: 1926. Why it matters: Major essay collection for extracting early intellectual positions on culture, history, parenthood, superstition, and social reform. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E5%A2%B3.
summary: Major essay collection for extracting early intellectual positions on culture, history, parenthood, superstition, and social reform.

title: 华盖集
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 华盖集. Type: author_work. Time: 1926. Why it matters: Captures Lu Xun's attack mode in杂文 form, especially his quick shifts from polemic to parable and his treatment of youth, language, and hypocrisy. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E8%8F%AF%E8%93%8B%E9%9B%86.
summary: Captures Lu Xun's attack mode in杂文 form, especially his quick shifts from polemic to parable and his treatment of youth, language, and hypocrisy.

title: 华盖集续编
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 华盖集续编. Type: author_work. Time: 1926. Why it matters: Useful for the sharpened public-intellectual voice after political pressure intensified, including memorial writing and tactical satire. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E8%8F%AF%E8%93%8B%E9%9B%86%E7%BA%8C%E7%B7%A8.
summary: Useful for the sharpened public-intellectual voice after political pressure intensified, including memorial writing and tactical satire.

title: 而已集
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 而已集. Type: author_work. Time: 1928. Why it matters: Good source for middle-period essay voice, especially social observation, reading practice, and how he turns local detail into broad critique. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/%E8%80%8C%E5%B7%B2%E9%9B%86.
summary: Good source for middle-period essay voice, especially social observation, reading practice, and how he turns local detail into broad critique.

title: 三闲集
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 三闲集. Type: author_work. Time: 1932. Why it matters: Adds essays from the 1927-1929 transition period and is important for Hong Kong, Shanghai, and literary politics in Lu Xun's public persona. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E4%B8%89%E9%96%92%E9%9B%86.
summary: Adds essays from the 1927-1929 transition period and is important for Hong Kong, Shanghai, and literary politics in Lu Xun's public persona.

title: 二心集
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 二心集. Type: author_work. Time: 1932. Why it matters: Critical for left-wing debates, translation views, answers to editors and students, and the increasingly explicit relation between literature and politics. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E4%BA%8C%E5%BF%83%E9%9B%86.
summary: Critical for left-wing debates, translation views, answers to editors and students, and the increasingly explicit relation between literature and politics.

title: 且介亭杂文
text: Lu Xun source in category works. Title: 且介亭杂文. Type: author_work. Time: 1934-1935. Why it matters: Late Lu Xun at high density: cultural criticism, rhetorical compression, irony under pressure, and several prefaces and responses central to persona modeling. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E4%B8%94%E4%BB%8B%E4%BA%AD%E9%9B%9C%E6%96%87.
summary: Late Lu Xun at high density: cultural criticism, rhetorical compression, irony under pressure, and several prefaces and responses central to persona modeling.

title: 《呐喊》自序
text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 《呐喊》自序. Type: author_work. Time: 1922-12-03. Why it matters: Foundational self-account of turning from medicine to literature, the iron-house metaphor, and the claim that literature should alter spirit rather than merely entertain. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E5%90%B6%E5%96%8A.
summary: Foundational self-account of turning from medicine to literature, the iron-house metaphor, and the claim that literature should alter spirit rather than merely entertain.

title: 我怎么做起小说来？
text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 我怎么做起小说来？. Type: author_work. Time: 1933-03-05. Why it matters: Direct statement of fiction method: write for life, select social sick points, cut ornament, and compress language until every part carries force. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E6%88%91%E6%80%8E%E9%BA%BC%E5%81%9A%E8%B5%B7%E5%B0%8F%E8%AA%AA%E4%BE%86%EF%BC%9F.
summary: Direct statement of fiction method: write for life, select social sick points, cut ornament, and compress language until every part carries force.

title: 《野草》题辞
text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 《野草》题辞. Type: author_work. Time: 1927. Why it matters: Key to Lu Xun's dark lyric self-positioning, especially the coexistence of despair, resistance, and refusal of consoling transcendence. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E9%87%8E%E8%8D%89.
summary: Key to Lu Xun's dark lyric self-positioning, especially the coexistence of despair, resistance, and refusal of consoling transcendence.

title: 《朝花夕拾》小引
text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 《朝花夕拾》小引. Type: author_work. Time: 1927. summary: Important for memory, retrospection, tonal softening, and the way recollection is never free from historical disturbance.

title: 为了忘却的记念
text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 为了忘却的记念. Type: author_work. Time: 1933. Why it matters: Anchors political grief, martyr memory, and the mix of tenderness and severity that later becomes central to a lead-reader persona. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/zh-hans/%E7%82%BA%E4%BA%86%E5%BF%98%E5%8D%BB%E7%9A%84%E8%A8%98%E5%BF%B5.

title: 读书杂谈
text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 读书杂谈. Type: author_work. Time: 1928. Why it matters: Useful for extracting how Lu Xun frames reading as training in judgment rather than passive admiration, which is directly relevant to guided reading behavior. Source URL: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/%E8%80%8C%E5%B7%B2%E9%9B%86.
summary: Useful for extracting how Lu Xun frames reading as training in judgment rather than passive admiration, which is directly relevant to guided reading behavior.

text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 《中国新文学大系》小说二集序. Type: author_work. Time: 1935-03-02. text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 《两地书》序言. Type: author_work. Time: 1932-12-16. text: Lu Xun source in category voice_sources. Title: 《呐喊》捷克译本序言. Type: author_work. Time: 1936-07-21.
